description: LiuqiuCoin (LIUQIU) is a cultural and historical crypto honoring the Kingdom of the Liuqiu Islands (a.k.a. 琉球王国), an East Asian civilization with centuries of identity, tradition, culture, and community, known as a tributary state of ancient China. Launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — LIUQIU carries the native people’s spirit, beliefs, and legacy of Liuqiu into the digital realm of Atlantis Kingdom.
name: LiuqiuCoin
